mapper.update: UPDATE ds_payment_outbox SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}

UPDATE ds_payment_outbox SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, status = 'PENDING', next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ds_payment_outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time <= NOW()) ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
